title: GENERAL DENTAL CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: LA CLINICA CENTRAL POINT HEALTH CENTER GENERAL DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental care services, including exams, cleanings, sealants, fillings, extractions, root canals, and pediatric dentistry, and dental prosthodontics. 4940 Hamrick Road Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 7am-6:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 7am-5:30pm Email (541) 512-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Appointments (541) 512-3900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid (OHP), Medicare, most private insurances, and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Endodontics General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
